mapper.insert: insert into osh_question_answer_user_question_follow (user_id, question_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{userId}, #{questionId}, now(), #{createBy}, now() ,#{createBy})
mapper.select: select question_id from osh_question_answer_user_question_follow where user_id = #{userId} and delete_flag = 0
